name: 下屬叛變（Varies反對婚姻）
description: 男主的副手Varies持續反對婚姻，認為女主配不上男主。這條線製造了「內部矛盾」——即使打敗外部敵人，自家人的反對仍是障礙，增加了劇情層次。

examples.drama_title: [FULL HD] She Married a Homeless CEO?! | Full Mini Drama HD | Romantic Comedy Series
examples.excerpt: Please divorce her, Captain. / Even if that's all true, she's still just a delivery girl. She's not worthy of the captain. / Whether she's worthy or not is not up for you to decide.
examples.context: 男主的副手Varies持續反對婚姻，認為女主配不上男主。這條線製造了「內部矛盾」——即使打敗外部敵人，自家人的反對仍是障礙，增加了劇情層次。
